policy: English and Chinese learning materials must come from open platforms, public-domain collections, Creative Commons sources, official open media, or explicitly authorized partner/self-produced content.

english.name: Wikimedia Commons
english.use: Direct media files with compatible licenses and attribution.

english.name: Internet Archive
english.use: Open video/audio files and public-domain speech recordings.

english.name: Official open government/media channels
english.use: Speeches, briefings, and education media with direct reuse permission.

chinese.name: 中文维基文库
chinese.use: 完整中文文章、古文、现代公版文本。

chinese.name: Wikimedia Commons
chinese.use: 中文音视频或可配套朗读的开放媒体。

chinese.name: Internet Archive
chinese.use: 中文公版书籍扫描、音频和开放集合。

chinese.name: Chinese Text Project
chinese.use: 仅在具体条目许可允许时用于中文经典文本。

disallowedByDefault: YouTube videos without explicit direct media reuse permission
commercial news clips without redistribution permission
copyrighted modern essays without publisher or author authorization
